title: Household fit and verification live together.
caption: The profile is both a trust surface and a matching surface, so it cannot be an afterthought.

hostMode.label: Host mode
hostMode.title: One app, lighter host tooling.
hostMode.copy: Supply-side actions stay narrow in v1: submit listing details, upload proof, respond to matches, and keep occupancy moving without building a full landlord operating system yet.
